docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY GEARHART, LISA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUI, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-15-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHUI, ANDREW
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-14 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS A SUBTENANT OF THE MASTER TENANT JUBENE LAGAREJOS, AND PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SHOULD BE BROUGHT AGAINST THE MASTER TENANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
